meaning: n.[语]次语言(指社会中某一集团或阶层专用的言语)
examples: Second, we introduce the precompiler technics for Data Sublanguage.
This is a sublanguage allowing navigation to nodes, retrieval of sets of nodes, and so forth.
Reasoners for OWL DL, while dealing with a decidable sublanguage, will be subject to higher worst-case complexity.
